definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Ya que / Puesto que (causa)]
definitions.usage_example: Since you are here, you can help.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Since you are here, you can help.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para introducir una razón (similar a 'because').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to introduce a reason (similar to 'because').

definitions.usage_example: I have been here since 9 AM.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I have been here since 9 AM.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para indicar un punto de inicio en el tiempo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to indicate a starting point in time.

definitions.usage_example: As I was tired, I went to bed.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As I was tired, I went to bed.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para indicar una razón (similar a 'because').]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to state a reason (similar to 'because').

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He sang as he walked.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para indicar que dos acciones ocurren al mismo tiempo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to indicate that two actions are happening at the same time.

definitions.usage_example: She is as tall as me.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She is as tall as me.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado para hacer una comparación de igualdad.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to make a comparison of equality.

definitions.usage_example: I was studying; meanwhile, my brother was playing.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I was studying; meanwhile, my brother was playing.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: En el período de tiempo intermedio.]
definitions.usage_context_es: In the intervening period of time.

definitions.usage_example: I don't know what to do.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I don't know what to do.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Usado como pronombre relativo para referirse a 'la(s) cosa(s) que'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative pronoun to refer to 'the thing(s) that'.
